steps.note: 13 data-source contracts grounded against publishers (10 tier A, 3 tier B). Original 12 incl. China (nbs/pboc marginals_only, safe mixed) merged to main via PR #2. REOPENED to add bis_cbs (BIS Consolidated Banking Statistics, tier A, bilateral) — the counterparty-nationality basis DP2 found missing. Grounding falsified naive guesses against the publisher (ultimate-risk is published as 'Guarantor basis' CBS_BASIS=U, not 'UR'; key 5A/position-S corrected); integrity critic BLOCKED an ungrounded L_MEASURE=S code in the headline observation, fixed by adding the CL_STOCK_FLOW excerpt (S = Amounts outstanding/Stocks). Determination: CBS-UR NARROWS but does NOT CLOSE the DP2 China HOLE (bank-claims leg only; non-bank securities/Treasury leg and offshore-SPV issuer-nationality remain uncovered). REOPENED AGAIN for imf_cpis: the DP2 audit (build/audit/cpis_probe.json) proved CPIS bilateral was OBTAINABLE — DP2's HOLE was a US-vs-ISO3-USA query bug, not absent data. Coverage census (build/contracts/cpis_coverage.json, integrity-critic PASS) establishes the bilateral matrix is DENSE in the counterpart dimension and among 83/259 reporting economies, SPARSE in the reporter dimension (176 non-reporters; VGB the one load-bearing reporter hole). CPIS RESTORES the bilateral structure F3/F4 need but is RESIDENCY-based and does NOT close the offshore-SPV issuer-nationality gap (distinct, carried-forward hole). Carry-forward requirements for the DP2 re-run recorded in build/audit/dp2_rerun_requirements.md (fix claims/liabilities label swap; persist RAS column-targets for reproducibility; do not assume the ~$711bn BIS marginal-asymmetry floor collapses when CPIS cells populate).

RE-RUN (supersedes prior DP2) on the CPIS-augmented matrix. 873 OBSERVED cells (Fed EFA 585, TIC 36+residual, BIS LBS 76, COFER 9, + 167 CPIS bilateral portfolio cells; 0 ESTIMATED) — delta +167 vs prior 706 (prior had CPIS as a HOLE on a query bug). Audit corrections applied and integrity-critic VERIFIED (PASS): (1) claims/liabilities label swap fixed and checked against BIS source (C=claims $9.53tn, L=liabilities $10.24tn, hand-summed); (2) residual now REPRODUCIBLE — build/model/ras_inputs.json persists row/col targets + seed; build/results/dp2_recompute_check.py regenerates it from disk alone (passed=true); (3) NO assumed collapse — CPIS block is a labeled CONSISTENCY pass (no independent portfolio marginal on disk), and the binding residual is the irreducible ~$711.16bn BIS claims/liabilities marginal floor, untouched by CPIS. Offshore-hub cells (US->CYM $2.8tn etc.) kept basis=residency, NOT reallocated; offshore-SPV issuer-nationality fraction a bounded cell-level HOLE in 3 artifacts. Largest residual = the $711bn BIS floor.

SPECIFICATION ONLY (no parameter fit; estimation is DP4, not begun). Four factors mapped to OBSERVED matrix quantities: F1 (BIS USD marginals + Fed S2), F2 (TIC/Fed S4, QUANTITY-only; convenience-yield a HOLE, not proxied), F3 (CPIS issuer shares across CYM/HKG/VGB/CHN), F4 (USA issuer column across 12 holders). F3/F4 separating restriction R_sep stated with economic content, identifying matrix variation, a FALSIFIER (if destinations are offshore-USD ABS via Cayman SPVs, F4 also moves them -> F3/F4 observationally equivalent), and falsifier-case status checked against the matrix: PARTIALLY obtains (destination cells now dense -> testable-IN-PRINCIPLE, an advance vs the old NOT-TESTABLE; but nationality is a HOLE and there is one period). STEP-0 grounded interval [0,0.60] (NBER WP 30865). STEP-3 sensitivity = FORM (b): identification FLIPS across the interval; the China-nationality fraction is LOAD-BEARING. Fails at f=0 (F3=F4 observationally); only conditionally identified toward 0.60 (second HOLE: offshore-USD ABS share); no f* invented, no distribution assigned. OPERATIVE VERDICT for DP5: F3/F4 separation NOT ESTABLISHED (depends on data we do not have); the f->0.60 branch must NOT be read as identification. Integrity-critic PASS on all 6 gate checks; routed R_sep's economic validity (a hypothesis, not verified) to the human gate. Carried forward unresolved: offshore issuer-nationality HOLE, $711bn BIS floor, F2 price leg. DP4 not begun.

ESTIMATION under the DP3 form-(b) verdict (NOT re-opened/softened/overturned). Built the identification operator M=[v_F3|v_F4] (15x2) from real matrix cells; computed the SINGULAR SPECTRUM across the (f, USD-share) plane. NUMERICAL confirmation of DP3's analytic degeneracy: at f=0 the separating term f*DESTn vanishes -> operator rank 1 -> smallest singular value (separation margin) = 0.0; collapsing right-singular vector = (-0.707,+0.707) = the F3-minus-F4 difference is unresolved. Margin SURFACE: ->0 along the ENTIRE f=0 edge for all USD-share; monotone up in f, down in USD-share (even f=0.60 dragged 0.378->0.284 by the confound). HAZARD = a CONDITIONAL SURFACE over the two holes, NOT a point (a point hazard refused as a stage failure); infimum of the margin over the admissible plane = 0 -> binding-mode NOWHERE robustly identified. 2022 episode reported F-CONTINGENT (loads as F4 at the f=0 endpoint), NOT revived as F3. Single-snapshot contagion-vs-substitution discriminator marked UNESTIMABLE, not proxied. REPRODUCIBLE: build/results/dp4_recompute_check.py regenerates the spectrum from dp4_inputs.json ALONE (passed=true, max dev 5.6e-17). Integrity-critic PASS on all 6 gate checks; routed to human gate: the shared-USA-block assumption (makes f=0 margin exactly 0 - faithful to DP3 step2 but a judgment) and the tau=0.10 threshold. RESULTS STAMPED OUTPUT - NOT ESTABLISHED until the DP5 verifier (build/results/dp5_idtest.json) exists. Carried forward: both holes (f, offshore-USD share), $711bn BIS floor, single-snapshot limit. DP5 not begun.
